rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Or Tax Moskovitz Memorandum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 25, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANT CATALINA BOYKIN's Motion To Strike Or Tax Moskovitz Memorandum Of Costs continued to October 19, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later that October 1, 2105 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
